_comment: Copy this file to ticket-master.config.json and fill in your own values.

project_roots._comment: Add your own project directories here.
project_roots.name: my-software

claude._comment: Anthropic Claude CLI (https://github.com/anthropic-ai/claude-code). Set TM_SKIP_PERMISSIONS=1 to pass --dangerously-skip-permissions.

codex._comment: OpenAI Codex CLI (https://github.com/openai/codex). Adjust command path as needed.

agy._comment: Gemini CLI or compatible wrapper. Adjust command path as needed.

advisor._comment: Optional: advisor model for high-stakes tickets (score >= 35). Not programmatically configurable in all harnesses — may require manual activation.

score_thresholds._comment: Map score ranges to provider tiers. Adjust to match your available models.
